stories.title: **Headline:** Mets' 12-Game Losing Streak — Historic Collapse for a Team That Won Last Year

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Mets just lost their 12th straight game. ⚾

Devin Williams blew a 3-0 lead. None retired. Final 5-3.

New York is 7-16. They've scored 22 runs in those 12 losses.

First team in MLB history to start with a winning year and do this. #Mets #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
139 teams in the World Series era have lost 12 straight games. ⚾

None of them reached the postseason that year.

The Mets are now 7-16. FanGraphs has their playoff odds at 41.3%.

They were at 79.5% before opening day. #Mets #MLB

article.headline: Mets' 12-Game Losing Streak Is Historic — First Team to Follow a Winning Season with an April Collapse This Long

stories.title: **Headline:** Ohtani's Two-Way Dominance Continues — 52-Game On-Base Streak, 0.50 ERA Through Three Starts

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani in 2026: ⚾

🔴 52-game on-base streak (3rd in Dodgers history)
🔴 .402 OBP / .908 OPS / 5 HR at the plate
🔴 0.50 ERA through 3 starts on the mound
🔴 Dodgers: 16-6, No. 1 in MLB

There is no one else like him. #Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers are first in the majors in: ⚾

BA (.287) · OBP (.364) · SLG (.499)
Opponents' BA (.193) · WHIP (1.05)

The guy carrying this team is also pitching to a 0.50 ERA.

Ohtani is doing things no one has ever done. #Dodgers #ShoheiOhtani #MLB

article.headline: Ohtani Is Doing the Impossible Again — 52-Game On-Base Streak, 0.50 ERA, and the Best Team in Baseball

stories.title: **Headline:** Dodgers Set Franchise HR Record — 42 Home Runs in First 22 Games

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Dodgers have 42 home runs through 22 games. ⚾

That's a franchise record.

Muncy: 8. Rushing: 7. Ohtani: 5. Pages: 5.
12 different Dodgers have gone deep.

Mookie Betts hasn't even played most of this stretch. #Dodgers #MLB

article.headline: Dodgers Set Franchise Home Run Record — 42 in First 22 Games, Power Coming from Every Corner of the Lineup

stories.title: **Headline:** Jordan Walker Is the NL's Hottest Hitter — Cardinals Outfielder Leads with 8 HRs

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Jordan Walker leads the NL with 8 home runs. ⚾

He's slashing .315/.375/.685 for the Cardinals.

This month: grand slam, stolen base, 3+ hits, AND an outfield assist in one game. First Cardinals player since Ray Lankford in 1997.

Walker is for real. #Cardinals #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Aaron Judge Leads MLB with 9 HRs — Career Milestones Piling Up

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge leads MLB with 9 home runs. ⚾

He's also climbing Yankees history at age 33:

→ 90th career first-inning HR (3rd in franchise history)
→ 47 multi-HR games (2nd in Yankees history, behind Babe Ruth)

He turns 34 on Saturday. #Yankees #AaronJudge #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Reds Lead NL Central — Best Start Since 2006, Chase Burns Emerges as Ace

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The Cincinnati Reds are 15-8. First in the NL Central. ⚾

Their best start since 2006.

Chase Burns: 2.42 ERA · 22 Ks in 22.1 IP · 56.3% slider whiff rate.

The Reds beat the Rays 11-2 last night. They're for real. #Reds #MLB
